subject: It's live. You can invest in FarmThru now.
preheader: The equity crowdfunding campaign is open on Birchal. Here's how to invest.
body:
The moment we've been building toward is here.

FarmThru's equity crowdfunding campaign is now live on Birchal. You can invest today.

Over the past few weeks, you've seen the food. You've met the farms. You've heard from our founder and from the 2,000+ families who already order through FarmThru. Now you can own a piece of it.

How to invest. Click the link below to visit our campaign page on Birchal. Read the disclosure document. It covers our financials, our risks, our team, and exactly how the funds will be used. If you're comfortable, you can invest from $50 up to $10,000.

If you're a VIP member, you have priority access right now. The campaign opens to the general waitlist shortly after.

What you're backing. A farm-direct grocery store with 50+ regenerative farms across NSW. A hub-and-collect model that gets food from paddock to pick-up in 2-3 days. 100% grass-fed beef, pasture-raised chicken, heritage pork, wild-caught salmon. Every product from a named farm. And a team that includes co-founder Rachel Ward.

A note on risk. Investing in early-stage businesses carries risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.

Thank you for being here from the start.

Jeremy
creative_brief: Launch day email. High energy but grounded. Bold header: 'We're Live'. Key stats as a visual strip. Single prominent CTA button to the Birchal campaign page. Birchal badge. Compliance disclaimer clearly formatted. Jeremy's signature with headshot. This is the most important email in the sequence.
